---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or feature for Helix
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: feature, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the addition to the specifications (PRD, ADR, RFC).

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Value Proposition
How does this feature align with Helix's mission and goals? Who does this benefit?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or design details here.
